heroHeading: Calligraphy for Prints, Commissions, and Editorial Work
heroCopy: A living portfolio for handcrafted letterforms, brush experiments, and commissioned pieces. Replace the placeholders below with your latest work and this site is ready to publish on GitHub Pages.
statementHeading: Writing With Breath, Pressure, and Pace
statementParagraph1: I treat each line as a record of movement. My work blends historical calligraphic forms with contemporary spacing, creating pieces that feel both archival and immediate. I am especially drawn to the emotional weight of negative space.
statementParagraph2: Most pieces are made with broad-edge nibs, walnut ink, and handmade paper. The final compositions are then adapted for editorial layouts, gallery prints, and private commissions.
exhibitions: 2025 - Guest Feature in Letter Arts Journal
commissionText: Brand lettering, invitations, editorial headers, and one-off wall pieces.
aboutHeading: Crafted by Hand in the Studio
aboutBio: Add your bio here: training, influences, tools, process, and where your work has appeared. This section is designed to hold both short and long form artist stories.
contactIntro: For commission requests or licensing inquiries, reach out below.
